title: crambe hispanica var. glabrata
intro: Crambe hispanica var. glabrata, also known as sea kale, is a type of plant in the Brassica family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of sea kale include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. Sea kale can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or tablet form, or as a tea by infusing the leaves in hot water.
